name: MoneyGram
description_short: Long Beach, CA's MoneyGram at 400 E Anaheim St offers check-cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services daily 8AM-8PM.
description_long:
The MoneyGram location at 400 E Anaheim St in Long Beach, CA operates seven days a week from 8AM to 8PM, making it convenient for residents and workers in the downtown Anaheim corridor area. This standalone check-cashing store is positioned on the main thoroughfare, easily accessible by car and public transit.

At this Long Beach MoneyGram branch, customers can access check-cashing services, money transfers, bill payments, and prepaid card services. Call +1 562-436-9499 to confirm specific services, ask about rates, or discuss your money transfer or bill payment needs. The staff can help you navigate available options for your financial needs.

If you need quick check-cashing or money transfer services in Long Beach, CA, this location offers same-day processing with valid ID. Bring a government-issued photo ID and the check or payment information you're working with. Open seven days a week, it's a reliable option when you need fast financial services near downtown Long Beach.
address: 400 E Anaheim St D, Long Beach, CA 90813

company_info.headquarters: 400 E Anaheim St D, Long Beach, CA 90813

pros: 20+ convenient agent locations throughout Long Beach at familiar retail partners like Walmart, CVS, and local markets
Extended operating hours at many locations (some open until 9:00-10:00 PM) for after-work and evening access
Hybrid online and offline service model allowing digital transfers or in-person transactions based on customer preference
Money transfer services available at locations already visited for grocery shopping and other errands
Domestic and international money transfer capability through single network
Both send and receive money transfer functionality at all listed locations
Bill payment services available alongside money transfer at most agent locations
cons: No pricing transparency on website—transfer fees and exchange rates not disclosed before visiting a location
Service quality entirely dependent on individual agent retailer's operations, training, and customer service standards
Limited operating hours at some locations (Seaside Services closes at 3:00 PM; The Check Cashers at 7:00 PM)
No dedicated customer support center visible—phone numbers route to individual agent locations rather than corporate support
International transfer details, speed options, and limitations not documented on the location directory page
best_for: Consumers sending money to family or friends domestically or internationally who shop regularly at Walmart, grocery stores, or pharmacies
Individuals without bank accounts or those preferring cash-based money transfers over digital banking
People in Long Beach seeking evening or weekend money transfer access near their home or workplace
Customers needing money orders or bill payment services alongside occasional domestic transfers
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers in Long Beach who prioritize convenience and already frequent the retail partners hosting MoneyGram services, particularly those without traditional bank accounts. The primary caveat is the complete lack of pricing transparency on their website—customers cannot compare transfer costs or exchange rates before visiting a location, and service quality depends entirely on the individual agent retailer's training and operations rather than MoneyGram corporate standards.
services: In-person transfer processing at agent locations
Multi-language support (implied by diverse agent locations serving Long Beach communities)
meta_description: MoneyGram at 400 E Anaheim St, Long Beach, CA. Same-day check-cashing and money transfers available.
